taglines: Plant Power for a Better Life!
Pure nutrition, made simple, made honest.
brand_story: Started in a small polyhouse in Bangalore growing sunflower microgreens. A clean-eating experiment that became a mission: trustworthy, nutrient-dense plant-based foods grown and processed in India, with no additives or shortcuts.

typography.pairing_descriptor: bold geometric heading (Archivo 600) with clean humanist body (Inter 400)

imagery.composition: clean white or soft natural backgrounds, generous negative space, ingredient-forward shots

brand_values: pure nutrition — no additives or shortcuts
supporting local growers and a greener tomorrow

target_audience.profession: health-conscious urban Indians, parents, working professionals
pain_points: busy lifestyle leaving little time for nutrition
difficulty getting kids to eat greens
skepticism about supplement quality and claims

contact.address: 1129, 35th C Cross, Jayanagar 4th T Block, Bangalore 560041

extraction_notes: Colors and typography confirmed from project source (CLAUDE.md). Voice updated with about page: rational_emotional moved to 4 (lab testing / scientific validation emphasis), playful_serious moved to 5 (earnest mission-driven tone). Confidence: HIGH across all axes.
